title: Obstruction
summary: Defines even-dimensional obstruction-order data, an abstract obstruction tensor, and unobstructedness.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Defines even-dimensional obstruction-order data, an abstract obstruction tensor, and unobstructedness.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows Ambient/FG/Obstruction.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The critical obstruction order n / 2 in even dimension. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, its defining expression is n divided by 2.

A component-level obstruction tensor attached to a finite FG metric jet. Its mathematical data are: n: the natural numbers; even dim: n % 2 equals 0; order le: obstruction Order n is at most K; tensor: Sym2 Component ι; symmetric: Symmetric Component tensor; vanishing: Prop.
The obstruction tensor as a component-level two-tensor. In explicit terms, for o of type ambient obstruction data ι : equals ι j, its defining expression is O.tensor.
correspondence.leanType: def obstructionTensor (O : AmbientObstructionData (ι := ι) J) : Sym2Component ι

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For O of type Ambient Obstruction Data ι : equals ι J, Symmetric Component O.obstruction Tensor.
correspondence.leanType: theorem obstructionTensor_symmetric (O : AmbientObstructionData (ι := ι) J) : SymmetricComponent O.obstructionTensor

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: A finite jet is formally unobstructed when its obstruction data vanishes. In explicit terms, for o of type ambient obstruction data ι : equals ι j, its defining expression is O.vanishing.
correspondence.leanType: def IsUnobstructed (O : AmbientObstructionData (ι := ι) J) : Prop

references.locator: Chapters 2–3, ambient space and normal form
references.note: Geometric source for the ambient bundle, homogeneity, normal form, and commutator calculations.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
